claim: Advisor docs claim registry-driven routing, but Python and TS still hardcode mode maps.
Native advisor_recommend cannot currently score correct mode because public recommendations expose skillId but no workflowMode.
One-identity must stay: discovery recursively indexes graph-metadata.json and parse rejects skill_id mismatches.
Lane C skill-benchmark is the correct dogfood harness but needs parent-mode extensions because advisor-probe is skill-only today.
Hub path prose still drifts from registry packet paths and should become a benchmark/doctor finding.
